.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version constraint for jackson-databind to rely on the Spring Boot managed version.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages Jackson versions; explicit older versions may cause dependency conflicts or incompatibilities with the new Spring Boot BOM.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove the @Autowired annotation from the constructor to align with Spring Boot 3.x best practices for single-constructor injection.
